function.name: keyword_search
function.long_description: Searches documents in the local documents folder using exact keyword matching to find files containing the query.
example_user_queries: Search the knowledge_base source for the keyword "vector embeddings".
Run a keyword search for "incident response" in internal_docs.
Find documents in engineering_wiki containing "database migration".
Search source project_notes for the query "customer onboarding".
Look up "SLA breach" in support_articles using keyword search.
Search the policies source for "access control".
Find matches for "release checklist" in handbook.
Search the runbooks source for "disk space alert".
Find the term "forecast model" in analytics_repo.
